methodsAttempted.query: QS 2026 row 521 Saint Joseph University of Beirut (USJ)
methodsAttempted.notes: Confirmed target identity from the local QS 2026 ranking source.

methodsAttempted.query: site:usj.edu.lb artificial intelligence policy OR ChatGPT OR generative AI Saint Joseph University Beirut USJ
methodsAttempted.notes: Firecrawl search returned official USJ program, news, conference, and online-course pages; most were not policy-specific.

methodsAttempted.query: site:usj.edu.lb ChatGPT USJ intelligence artificielle IA plagiat
methodsAttempted.notes: Firecrawl search found official CINIA pages for guiding principles, AI educational tools, ChatGPT, Le Chat, and training catalog content.
The CINIA robots file allowed public pages outside /wp-admin/ and exposed a sitemap.

artifacts.summary: Official-source discovery found USJ CINIA guidance pages with direct AI-use, academic-integrity, privacy, and training text. Generic, program-only, event/news, and community-only sources were rejected or skipped.

artifacts.sourceTitle: Guiding Principles for Ethical Use of Artificial Intelligence in Higher Education Teaching and Learning
artifacts.queryUsed: site:usj.edu.lb ChatGPT USJ intelligence artificielle IA plagiat
artifacts.verificationNotes: Official CINIA page linked from USJ navigation; Firecrawl and HTTP fetch both returned direct guiding-principles text and an approval note from USJ's Committee for Digital and Artificial Intelligence Strategic Orientation.

artifacts.sourceTitle: ChatGPT-3 - Center for Digital Innovation and AI
artifacts.queryUsed: site:usj.edu.lb ChatGPT USJ intelligence artificielle IA plagiat
artifacts.verificationNotes: Official CINIA AI educational tool page with direct remarks on privacy risk, reviewing ChatGPT outputs, and unauthorized use as plagiarism.

artifacts.queryUsed: site:usj.edu.lb ChatGPT USJ intelligence artificielle IA plagiat
artifacts.verificationNotes: Official CINIA tool page that repeats the university privacy caution and academic-integrity remarks for a second free AI tool.

stopConditions: Use official USJ or CINIA sources only.
Do not access community-only SharePoint recordings.
Do not infer binding university-wide policy from news, degree catalogs, or event pages.
Stop after at least one verified policy-specific source supports claim and evidence candidates.

artifacts.errorReason: The linking official page states recordings are exclusively available to the USJ community; access was not attempted.

artifacts.claimText: USJ's CINIA page presents guiding principles intended to support effective, responsible, and ethical use of artificial intelligence in higher education teaching and learning, and says the principles were approved and validated by USJ's Committee for Digital and Artificial Intelligence Strategic Orientation.

artifacts.evidenceSnippetOriginal: L'utilisation de ChatGPT n'est pas nécessairement considérée comme une violation de l'intégrité académique, cependant, son utilisation non autorisée pour créer du contenu soumis comme étant le sien propre est considérée comme du plagiat et une violation de la politique d'intégrité académique.

artifacts.notes: Approved as a narrow claim about CINIA guiding principles and the page's own committee validation note; not marked as a canonical public fact.
Approved because the source directly says to verify data and information sources provided by generative AI.
Approved as academic-integrity guidance about incorporating and citing AI-altered or manipulated digital content; wording avoids making a broader binding-policy claim.
Approved because the official CINIA tool page directly warns of privacy risks related to free AI tools.
Approved because the ChatGPT page directly distinguishes ordinary use from unauthorized submission as one's own work.
Approved as a training-availability claim only; it does not assert binding policy requirements.

artifacts.title: Saint Joseph University of Beirut (USJ) AI Guidance Snapshot
artifacts.summary: USJ's CINIA pages provide guiding principles for responsible AI use in higher education teaching and learning, including source verification, academic-integrity citation guidance, privacy cautions for free AI tools, ChatGPT unauthorized-use plagiarism wording, and student training on proper AI use.
limitations: This tracker is not legal advice, not academic integrity advice, and not an official university statement unless a linked source is the university's own official page.
Claims are staged OpenClaw candidates only and are not published canonical facts.
Community-only SharePoint awareness recordings were not accessed.
artifacts.sourceRightsPolicy: Tracker metadata is open licensed. Official source documents, page text, PDFs, and other source materials retain their original rights and terms.
